agents.result:
### SUMMARY

Applied three changes across all four team.html files (superadmin, admin, ib, ba). Change 1: fixed the BA file's `<select id="member-role">` dropdown to use Admin/Investment Banker/Business Analyst; the IB file uses a multi-checkbox dropdown that already had the correct roles, and orphaned `<option>` tags were removed. Change 2: inserted the Roles & Permissions view section (`id="view-roles"`) with three role cards after the team members table in all four files. Change 3: added JavaScript to handle `?view=roles` URL parameter to toggle the roles view in all four files.

### EVIDENCE

- `pages/ba/team.html:409-414` – `<select id="member-role">` had old roles (Senior Associate, Associate Partner, Compliance Officer, Investment Banking Analyst); now verified at `pages/ba/team.html:473-477` with correct Admin/Investment Banker/Business Analyst options
- `pages/ib/team.html:427-429` – orphaned `<option>` tags (Associate Partner, Compliance Officer, Investment Banking Analyst) were floating in the form area; now verified clean at `pages/ib/team.html:425-426`
- `pages/ib/team.html:413-422` – multi-checkbox dropdown already contained correct roles (Admin, Investment Banker, Business Analyst)
- `pages/superadmin/team.html:296` – `view-roles` section inserted; `pages/superadmin/team.html:965` – JS handler inserted
- `pages/admin/team.html:296` – `view-roles` section inserted; `pages/admin/team.html:962` – JS handler inserted
- `pages/ib/team.html:295` – `view-roles` section inserted; `pages/ib/team.html:957` – JS handler inserted
- `pages/ba/team.html:295` – `view-roles` section inserted; `pages/ba/team.html:944` – JS handler inserted
- All four files confirmed via grep_files to contain `id="view-roles"` and `Handle Roles & Permissions view from URL`

### CHANGES

- `pages/ba/team.html` – Replaced member-role `<select>` options with Admin/Investment Banker/Business Analyst; cleaned trailing blank lines; inserted Roles & Permissions section; added JS view=roles handler
- `pages/ib/team.html` – Removed orphaned `<option>` tags from form area; fixed role-filter to use Admin/Investment Banker/Business Analyst; inserted Roles & Permissions section; added JS view=roles handler
- `pages/superadmin/team.html` – Inserted Roles & Permissions section after view-team; added JS view=roles handler
- `pages/admin/team.html` – Inserted Roles & Permissions section after view-team; added JS view=roles handler

### RISKS

- **IB file JS references `member-role` element that doesn't exist**: The IB file's `handleCreateTeamLogin` function references `document.getElementById('member-role').value` but no such element exists (IB uses a multi-checkbox dropdown instead). The superadmin file already uses the correct checkbox-based approach. This JS will error at runtime. Mitigation: update the IB JS to use the checkbox pattern (`.role-checkbox:checked`) matching superadmin/admin.
- **Superadmin and admin role-filters still use old role names**: These `role-filter` dropdowns (for filtering the team table) still contain Senior Associate, Associate Partner, Compliance Officer, Investment Banking Analyst. The task scope was limited to `member-role` selects only, so these were not changed. Mitigation: align role-filter options with the new role names across all files if needed.

### BLOCKERS

None.

All 4 files confirmed correct. The superadmin file now ends at line 2962 with `</body>` — the modal is completely removed.

---

### SUMMARY
Applied 16 targeted edits across all 4 role mandate files (`superadmin`, `admin`, `ib`, `ba`). The "Send Mandate" flow now navigates to the existing Create Mandate form (`switchView('mandates-create')`) instead of opening a modal. When the form is saved, `handleMandateAssignSubmit` checks `currentSendMandateId` and auto-enables (`sent = true`) the existing mandate. The old modal HTML, `closeSendMandateModal`, and `confirmSendMandate` functions are fully removed. New mandates also get `sent: false` by default.

### EVIDENCE
- `pages/superadmin/mandates.html:2459-2463` — simplified `sendMandate` using `switchView('mandates-create')`
- `pages/superadmin/mandates.html:2595-2602` — auto-enable block between `applyMandateFilters()` and `switchView`
- `pages/superadmin/mandates.html:2960-2962` — file ends cleanly with `</script></body>`, no modal
- `pages/admin/mandates.html:2460` — confirmed `switchView('mandates-create')` in sendMandate
- `pages/admin/mandates.html:2593` — confirmed auto-enable block
- `pages/ib/mandates.html` — grep confirms zero `confirmSendMandate` / `send-mandate-modal` hits
- `pages/ba/mandates.html` — grep confirms zero `confirmSendMandate` / `send-mandate-modal` hits
- `sent: false` confirmed in `db.mandates.push` for all 4 files

### CHANGES
- `pages/superadmin/mandates.html` — 4 edits: replaced sendMandate+helpers, deleted modal, added auto-enable block, added `sent: false`
- `pages/admin/mandates.html` — 4 edits: same changes
- `pages/ib/mandates.html` — 4 edits: same changes
- `pages/ba/mandates.html` — 4 edits: same changes

### RISKS
- None observed. The changes are purely behavioral: the "Send" button now navigates to the form, and saving auto-enables. No server-side or persistence changes needed since `db.mandates` is an in-memory array.

### BLOCKERS
None.

agents.prompt:
Fix the "Create Team Login" modal across all 4 role team pages. Currently it's a **side drawer** (slides from right, full height) with a dark overlay. Change it to a **centered popup** with NO dark background overlay.

**Files:** `pages/superadmin/team.html`, `pages/admin/team.html`, `pages/ib/team.html`, `pages/ba/team.html`

**For EACH file**, find the modal (around the `modal-create-team-login` div) and change:

**FROM (current - side drawer):**
```html
    <div id="modal-create-team-login" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs flex justify-end items-center z-40 transition-opacity">
        <div class="bg-white w-full max-w-md h-full shadow-2xl border-l border-slate-100 flex flex-col justify-between transform translate-x-0 transition-transform">
```

**TO (centered popup, no dark bg):**
```html
    <div id="modal-create-team-login" class="hidden fixed inset-0 flex justify-center items-center z-40">
        <div class="bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 flex flex-col m-4">
```

KEY CHANGES:
- Remove `bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs` (no dark overlay)
- Change `justify-end` to `justify-center` (center the popup)
- Remove `transition-opacity`
- Change inner div: remove `h-full border-l border-slate-100`, add `rounded-xl border-slate-200 m-4`
- Remove `justify-between transform translate-x-0 transition-transform`

The superadmin file may have residue from a partial edit. Read it first, find the modal block precisely, and fix it cleanly. Then apply to the other 3 files.

Use write_file if edit_file fails due to whitespace issues. Process all 4 files.

assignment.objective:
Fix the "Create Team Login" modal across all 4 role team pages. Currently it's a **side drawer** (slides from right, full height) with a dark overlay. Change it to a **centered popup** with NO dark background overlay.

**Files:** `pages/superadmin/team.html`, `pages/admin/team.html`, `pages/ib/team.html`, `pages/ba/team.html`

**For EACH file**, find the modal (around the `modal-create-team-login` div) and change:

**FROM (current - side drawer):**
```html
    <div id="modal-create-team-login" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs flex justify-end items-center z-40 transition-opacity">
        <div class="bg-white w-full max-w-md h-full shadow-2xl border-l border-slate-100 flex flex-col justify-between transform translate-x-0 transition-transform">
```

**TO (centered popup, no dark bg):**
```html
    <div id="modal-create-team-login" class="hidden fixed inset-0 flex justify-center items-center z-40">
        <div class="bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 flex flex-col m-4">
```

KEY CHANGES:
- Remove `bg-slate-900/60 backdrop-blur-xs` (no dark overlay)
- Change `justify-end` to `justify-center` (center the popup)
- Remove `transition-opacity`
- Change inner div: remove `h-full border-l border-slate-100`, add `rounded-xl border-slate-200 m-4`
- Remove `justify-between transform translate-x-0 transition-transform`

The superadmin file may have residue from a partial edit. Read it first, find the modal block precisely, and fix it cleanly. Then apply to the other 3 files.

Use write_file if edit_file fails due to whitespace issues. Process all 4 files.

agents.result:
### SUMMARY
Fixed the "Create Team Login" modal across all 4 role team pages (`superadmin`, `admin`, `ib`, `ba`). Changed from a right-sliding side drawer with dark overlay to a centered popup with no background overlay. The superadmin file had residue from a prior partial edit (duplicate inner div with jumbled class strings), which was cleaned up. All 4 files now have identical, correct modal markup.

### EVIDENCE
- `pages/superadmin/team.html:382-383` — outer div: `hidden fixed inset-0 flex justify-center items-center z-40` (no overlay, centered); inner div: `bg-white w-full max-w-md rounded-xl shadow-2xl border border-slate-200 flex flex-col m-4` (rounded popup with margin)
- `pages/admin/team.html:382-383` — identical corrected markup
- `pages/ib/team.html:382-383` — identical corrected markup
- `pages/ba/team.html:382-383` — identical corrected markup
- `grep_files` for `bg-slate-900/60.*modal-create-team-login` across all pages: 0 matches
- `grep_files` for `backdrop-blur-xs` in superadmin and admin team files: 0 matches
- superadmin file went from 884 to 883 lines (duplicate inner div removed)

### CHANGES
- `pages/superadmin/team.html` — removed jumbled residue on line 383, deleted duplicate old inner div line, normalized indentation (RLM Python write)
- `pages/admin/team.html` — replaced outer div classes (removed overlay/backdrop, changed justify-end→justify-center, removed transition-opacity) and inner div classes (added rounded-xl, border-slate-200, m-4; removed h-full, border-l, border-slate-100, justify-between, transform, transition-transform)
- `pages/ib/team.html` — same two-line edit as admin
- `pages/ba/team.html` — same two-line edit as admin

### RISKS
- None observed.

### BLOCKERS
- None.

agents.prompt:
Fix the "Create Team Login" modal across all 4 role team pages with 3 changes: **Files:** `pages/superadmin/team.html`, `pages/admin/team.html`, `pages/ib/team.html`, `pages/ba/team.html` --- ### Change 1: Add subtle backdrop blur to modal overlay Find the outer modal div: ```
``` Add `bg-slate-900/30 backdrop-blur-sm`: ```
``` ### Change 2: Replace role select with multi-select Find the role `` with a multi-select that has checkboxes: ```html
``` ### Change 3: Replace dark header with white header Find the modal header: ```html
``` Replace with white header: ```html
``` And change the close button from `text-slate-400 hover:text-white` to `text-slate-400 hover:text-slate-600`. Change the title text from `text-white` to `text-slate-900`. Change the subtitle from `text-slate-400` to `text-slate-400`. Also update the `openCreateTeamModal` JS function to clear the multi-select checkboxes (add after `document.getElementById('form-team-login').reset();`): ```javascript document.querySelectorAll('.role-checkbox').forEach(cb => cb.checked = false); document.getElementById('role-multi-label').innerText = 'Select Roles'; ``` And update the submit handler to read from checkboxes instead of select. Find where it reads `document.getElementById('member-role').value` and replace with: ```javascript const roles = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.role-checkbox:checked')).map(cb => cb.value); const role = roles.join(', ') || 'No Role'; ``` For each file: read it, apply all changes. The IB and BA files may have slightly different formatting — adapt accordingly. Process all 4 files.

agents.prompt:
Fix `pages/ba/team.html` — a previous edit accidentally replaced `hover:text-white` with `hover:text-slate-600` across the ENTIRE file, including sidebar navigation where it should stay as `hover:text-white`.

**The fix:** Revert `hover:text-slate-600` back to `hover:text-white` but ONLY in the sidebar `<nav>` section and sidebar toggle button. The modal close button should keep `hover:text-slate-600`.

**Steps:**
1. Read the file
2. Find every instance of `hover:text-slate-600` in the sidebar nav (between `<nav class="px-3` and `</nav>`)
3. Change those back to `hover:text-white`
4. Also fix the sidebar collapse button: `hover:text-slate-600` → `hover:text-white`
5. The modal close button (`closeCreateTeamModal`) should remain `hover:text-slate-600`
6. The secure dialog close button (`closeSecureDialog`) should remain `hover:text-slate-600`

Use edit_file. The sidebar nav buttons have this pattern:
`hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-slate-600` → should be `hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white`

Also `hover:bg-slate-900/50 hover:text-slate-600` → `hover:bg-slate-900/50 hover:text-white`

And the toggle button: `text-slate-500 hover:text-slate-600` → `text-slate-500 hover:text-white`
